name: obsidian-qa
description: Model-agnostic Obsidian vault Q&A skill that requires the official Obsidian CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Use the official Obsidian CLI to search raw vault notes and answer from evidence.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local, model-agnostic skill for vault question answering. It requires the official Obsidian CLI, performs multi-query retrieval against raw notes, and answers only from opened note evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use Obsidian CLI to answer from raw vault notes.
Search the vault with multiple short queries before concluding.
Quote evidence paths from notes you actually opened.
